title: epiphyllum phyllanthus var. guatemalense
intro: Epiphyllum phyllanthus var. guatemalense, a type of cactus, is a flowering epiphyte native to tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in traditional remedies for its purported healing properties.
